code: var results = new System.Collections.Generic.List<string>(); results.Add("Hash=" + IngameState.Data.CurrentAreaHash + " Level=" + IngameState.Data.CurrentAreaLevel); var playerG = Player.GridPosNum; results.Add("PlayerGrid=" + (int)playerG.X + "," + (int)playerG.Y); foreach (var e in Entities) { if (e.Path == null) continue; if (e.Path.Contains("Sekhema") || e.Path.Contains("Portal") || e.Path.Contains("Transition")) { var gp = e.GridPosNum; var dist = System.Math.Sqrt((gp.X-playerG.X)*(gp.X-playerG.X)+(gp.Y-playerG.Y)*(gp.Y-playerG.Y)); results.Add("id=" + e.Id + " path=" + e.Path.Substring(e.Path.LastIndexOf('/')+1) + " dist=" + (int)dist + " tgt=" + e.IsTargetable + " type=" + e.Type + " grid=" + (int)gp.X + "," + (int)gp.Y); } } string.Join("\n", results)
